title: 🐮Amoozing COWS🐄
description: Add new models and variants for cows
body:
![Amoozing Cows Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d74d1dbf9a08fcad7f70689130e651366f1041b9.png)

**Amoozing Cows pack give cows a new visual with slight changes and improvements in its model**
##

![Cows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc52f45ff42eb09baf2a35ee641bb0bcbac7dab1.png)

- Warm, Cold and Temperate cow variants
- cows now have 3 variants per type
- also adds unique models to calf/calves
- blink animations




**Requires: [OPTIFINE](optifine.net/downloads 'Download Here') or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)+[EMF](modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)  mods**

<details>
<summary>More Info</summary>

To make sure the pack is working, you will not only need the mods, but also specific options turned on, with EMF/ETF theyre already on by default, but with optifine, not always check if both CustomEntityModels and RandomEntities are turned on

Options > Video Settings > Quality >
Custom Entity Models ON & Random Entities ON

Fresh Animations compatibility version planned*
</details>

<details>
<summary>COW WIKI</summary>

|TYPE                 | Where to find    |Rename to Get   |
|---------------------|:----------------:|---------------:|
|Common Cows   | Temperate Biomes  |Unavailable ❌|
|Reddish Oxen         | Warm Biomes       |Unavailable ❌|
|Fuzzy Cows            |Cold Biomes        |Unavailable ❌|
|White Cow        | Temperate Biomes     | Unavailable ❌   |
|?????????            | ????????????      |Unavailable ❌|

</details>
